At NOM NOM the world

CONTACT

We are a new and exciting food brand in Puerto Rico, bringing the authentic taste of instant ramen and exotic snacks from different parts of the world.

Facebook Twitter Youtube
© 2023 NOM NOM, All Rights Reserved

Online store

Imagine choosing and receiving in seconds an instant ramen that transports your senses to different corners of the world. At NOM NOM, we have set out to change the way Puerto Rico experiences ramen and exotic snacks, we offer you speed and convenience, the authenticity of global flavors through a digital experience in our online store.
  • San Juan, Puerto Rico
  • Shop Online 24/7

Pick up

Once you place your order, we will contact you to arrange the day and time that best suits you for delivery or pick up. In addition, we will establish together the most suitable meeting point, thus guaranteeing a comfortable and personalized experience for you.
